name: Steel
description: Steel.dev open-source headless browser API for AI agents. Spin up cloud browser sessions, capture cookies/storage as reusable contexts, or hit one-shot scrape/screenshot/PDF endpoints without managing a session.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Steel API key from https://app.steel.dev (Settings > API Keys).

tools.name: create_session
tools.description: Create a new cloud browser session. Returns a session ID and a websocket URL (wss://connect.steel.dev?apiKey=...&sessionId=...) that Playwright/Puppeteer can connect to. Sessions persist cookies, localStorage, and tabs until released.

sessionTimeout.description: Maximum session duration in seconds before auto-release.

useProxy.description: Route session traffic through Steel's residential proxy.

tools.name: list_sessions
tools.description: List recent browser sessions for the account.

tools.name: get_session
tools.description: Retrieve details for a specific session: status, websocket URL, region, debug URL.

tools.name: release_session
tools.description: End a live session and free its resources. Released sessions can no longer be connected to but their context (cookies/storage) and recordings remain available.

tools.name: get_session_context
tools.description: Fetch the persisted browser context (cookies, localStorage, sessionStorage) for a session. Useful for extracting login state to reuse later.

tools.name: scrape
tools.description: One-shot scrape of a URL — Steel handles the browser, returns cleaned content. No session management needed. Returns text, HTML, markdown, or all three depending on format.

waitFor.description: Milliseconds to wait after page load before capturing content.

tools.name: screenshot
tools.description: One-shot screenshot of a URL. Returns a PNG image (binary or base64 depending on response handling).

fullPage.description: Capture the full scrollable page rather than just the viewport.

tools.name: pdf
tools.description: One-shot render of a URL to PDF. Returns a PDF file.
